title: Ubiquiti UF-GP-C+ - U Fiber GPON OLT, Class C+ SFP Module
description: UFiber GPON SFP modul with PN: UF-GP-C+ is designed to GPON slots in OLT unit from Ubiquiti. It is a special SFP module with asymmetric speed 2,5Gbps upload, 1,25Gbps download in direction to clients GPON SFP module has SC connector with UPC grind and 20km range. Transmitting power is 3 up to 7dBm , receiving sensitivity is -12 up to -30dBm
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1.244 / 2.488 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1490 / 1310 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type GPON Tx power [dBm] 3 up to 7 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 12 up to -30 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC
